notes: Added fortifyTile(x, y) to actions.js: costs 40 stone + 25 iron, sets tile.fortified=true, tile.defense+=15, emits MAP_CHANGED. Updated _showImprovementPicker() in mapPanel.js: added fortifySection (shows 'Fortified' badge or 'Fortify' button with cost) to all 3 modal states (already-improved, no-improvement, can-build); renamed modal header from 'Build Improvement' to 'Tile Actions'. Added data-fortify click handler in _createImprovementPicker(). Canvas: draw blue '▲' glyph in tile top-right corner for fortified player tiles in _drawTile(). Tile tooltip: shows '🏰' next to defense value for fortified tiles; shows 'Click → Fortify (+15 def)' hint for unfortified player tiles. enemyAI.js: clears tile.fortified+restores defense when enemy captures tile; fortified tiles get -30% enemy counterattack win chance (tile.fortified check after formation and fortification tech). CSS: .imp-fortify-row, .imp-fortify-label, .btn--fortify (blue), .imp-fortified (blue badge). Imported fortifyTile in mapPanel.js.

title: tribute and ceasefire system
description: Pay gold to pause war raids; demand tribute from losing enemies.
notes: diplomacy.js: Added TRIBUTE_COST=150, TRIBUTE_DEMAND=60, CEASEFIRE_TICKS=120*4=480, DEMAND_WARSCORE_MIN=10. payTribute(empireId): costs 150 gold, sets emp.ceasefireTick=tick+480, supresses raids. demandTribute(empireId): requires warScore>=10, grants 60 gold + sets ceasefireTick (AI pays, no raids for 30s). _warRaid() checks ceasefireTick before raiding. Migration in initDiplomacy() adds ceasefireTick:0 to older saves. diplomacyPanel.js: Imported new functions/constants. TICK throttle re-renders on active ceasefires. War card shows ceasefire badge (⏳ Xsecs) when active, or Pay Tribute + Demand Tribute buttons otherwise (Demand Tribute only visible at warScore>=10). _onClick handles payTribute/demandTribute cases. CSS: .btn--pay-tribute (dim border, blue hover), .btn--demand-tribute (gold border), .dipl-ceasefire-badge (blue pill countdown).

title: garrison system
description: Station units on owned tiles for defense bonuses against enemy AI attacks.
notes: state.js: Added garrisons:null field, reset in initState(). events.js: GARRISON_CHANGED event. actions.js: garrisonUnit(x,y,unitId,count=1) validates ownership/non-capital/army availability/food cost (30/unit)/cap (10 total); removes from state.units, stores in state.garrisons[key]; food deducted. withdrawGarrison(x,y) returns units to army. destroyGarrison(x,y) silently destroys on enemy capture (no refund). getTotalGarrisoned() and GARRISON_MAX_TOTAL exported. resources.js: Garrison upkeep loop iterates state.garrisons values to maintain resource drain. enemyAI.js: Imports destroyGarrison; adds tileGarrison defense bonus to playerDefense before winChance calc; calls destroyGarrison on capture. mapPanel.js: Imports UNITS, garrisonUnit, withdrawGarrison, getTotalGarrisoned, GARRISON_MAX_TOTAL. GARRISON_CHANGED listener triggers re-render. _drawTile draws yellow shield+count in bottom-left of garrisoned tiles. Tile tooltip shows garrison info (unit type, count, +def). _garrisonSection() builds picker HTML (existing garrison: unit badge + Withdraw; no garrison: unit type buttons). All 3 picker states include garrisonSection. main.js: garrisons in save/load (save version 21→22). CSS: .imp-garrison container (gold-tinted border), .imp-garrison__header/current/limit/units, .btn--garrison-unit (gold hover), .btn--garrison-withdraw (red hover).

title: alternative victory conditions (Diplomatic & Economic)
description: Add two additional win paths alongside the existing Conquest Victory. Diplomatic Victory: all 3 AI empires allied simultaneously. Economic Victory: 50,000 lifetime gold earned + Economics tech researched. Each path shows distinct messaging in the game-over overlay. Victory conditions checklist in Empire Summary expanded to show all three paths with live progress.
notes: systems/victory.js: Added DIPLOMATIC_VICTORY (all 3 empires allied) and ECONOMIC_VICTORY (50k gold earned + economics tech) checks ahead of conquest check; _trigger() now accepts victoryType param and stores it in state.gameOver; exported WIN_ECONOMIC_GOLD constant. ui/gameOverPanel.js: VICTORY_TYPES lookup dict (conquest/diplomatic/economic); renders .go-victory-type badge below title showing e.g. "🤝 Diplomatic Victory"; uses victory-type icon. ui/summaryPanel.js: imported WIN_ECONOMIC_GOLD; expanded _progressionCard() to show 3 separate victory-path sections each with a header and progress rows; diplomatic shows allied count/3; economic shows Economics tech status + gold progress bar. styles/main.css: .go-victory-type (gold pill badge). No save version bump needed — victoryType lives in state.gameOver which is not persisted.

title: hero skills system
description: Champion hero gains a skill choice every 5 combat victories (max 3 skills). 10-skill pool: Battle-Hardened (+20 atk), War Drums (+25% combat mult), Logistics (+10% rates), Treasury Guard (+0.8 gold/s), Quartermaster (+0.6 food/s), Arcane Attunement (+0.5 mana/s), Swift Training (-20% train time), Veteran Knowledge (-20% research time), Iron Will (+8 morale/win), War Profiteer (+30% loot). Skill chooser card in military panel. Skills wired into combat.js, resources.js, research.js, actions.js. HERO_LEVEL_UP event. Save version 23.
notes: data/hero.js: Added HERO_SKILLS (10 skills: battle_hardened/war_drums/logistics/treasury_guard/quartermaster/arcane_attunement/swift_training/veteran_knowledge/iron_will/war_profiteer), HERO_SKILL_WIN_INTERVAL=5, HERO_MAX_SKILLS=3, heroSkillBonus() pure helper. core/events.js: HERO_LEVEL_UP added. core/actions.js: recruitHero() adds skills/combatWins/pendingSkillOffer to hero state; trainUnit() applies swift_training -20% mult; added chooseHeroSkill(id). systems/combat.js: getAttackPreview() + attackTile() apply attackBonus + combatMult from hero skills; _victory() applies lootMult to loot + moraleBonus bonus from iron_will; added _trackHeroCombatWin() — increments combatWins, generates pendingSkillOffer every 5 wins up to max 3, emits HERO_LEVEL_UP. systems/resources.js: hero skill resourceRate bonuses + ratesMult applied after hero upkeep in recalcRates(). systems/research.js: veteran_knowledge researchMult applied to totalTicks. ui/militaryPanel.js: imports updated; HERO_LEVEL_UP subscribed; _heroSkillsSection() renders either skill-chooser (offer pending) or active-skills list + progress line; inject into _heroActiveSection(); _handleClick intercepts [data-choose-skill]. main.js: save version 22→23; hero migration guard adds skills/combatWins/pendingSkillOffer on old saves. styles/main.css: .hero-skills-section/--offer, .hero-skills-title, .hero-skills-chooser, .hero-skill-option/__icon/__body/__name/__desc, .btn--skill-choose, .hero-skill-active/__icon/__body/__name/__desc, .hero-skills-hint/.hero-skills-progress.

title: tech mastery bonus system
description: Four tech mastery groups (Military/Economic/Arcane/Agrarian). Researching all techs in a group unlocks a permanent empire-wide bonus. Military: +40 flat attack, -20% unit upkeep. Economic: +3 gold/s, +30% trade route income. Arcane: +500 mana cap, +1.5 mana/s. Agrarian: -15% building costs, +0.5 food/wood/stone per second. MASTERY_UNLOCKED event. Mastery progress bars and unlocked badges in Research panel. state.masteries persists in save (version 24).
notes: data/techs.js: Added MASTERY_GROUPS export (4 entries: military/economic/arcane/agrarian) each with id/name/icon/desc/techs array/bonusLabel. core/state.js: Added masteries:{} field + reset in initState(); added politicalEvents:null field. core/events.js: Added MASTERY_UNLOCKED + POLITICAL_EVENT constants. systems/research.js: Imported MASTERY_GROUPS; added _checkMasteries(techId) — iterates groups, skips already-unlocked, checks if all group techs done after new tech completes, records tick in state.masteries[group.id], calls recalcRates(), logs, emits MASTERY_UNLOCKED; _checkMasteries() called in researchTick() after TECH_CHANGED emit. systems/resources.js: Trade route loop — added economicMasteryMult=1.3 when economic mastery unlocked; upkeepMult=0.80 applied to unit upkeep (and garrison upkeep) when military mastery unlocked; mastery flat bonus block (economic +3 gold, arcane +1.5 mana +500 mana cap, agrarian +0.5 food/wood/stone) applied just before Object.assign. systems/combat.js: Applied state.masteries?.military +40 attackPower in both getAttackPreview() and attackTile() after conqueror archetype; getAttackPreview() returns militaryMastery flag. core/actions.js: scaledCost() applies masteryMult=0.85 when agrarian mastery unlocked. ui/researchPanel.js: Imported MASTERY_GROUPS; subscribed MASTERY_UNLOCKED→renderResearchPanel; added _masteriesSection() with 4 mastery-cards — unlocked (gold border, MASTERED badge, all tech icons lit, bonus text); locked (progress bar + dim tech icons, pct label); injected between tech-grid and _policySection(). main.js: Imported initPoliticalEvents+politicalEventTick; save version 23→24; masteries+politicalEvents persisted in _save()/_applySave(); MASTERY_UNLOCKED→_updateScoreBadge. CSS: .mastery-section, .mastery-grid (auto-fill 220px), .mastery-card/--unlocked (gold border+tint), .mastery-card__header/icon/name, .mastery-badge (gold pill), .mastery-progress-label, .mastery-techs/.mastery-tech/--done (dim vs bright), .mastery-bar-wrap/.mastery-bar (gold fill), .mastery-bonus/--active/--locked.

title: political events system
description: Random political crises fire every 5-10 minutes. 8 event types (harvest_festival/tax_dispute/desertion_crisis/merchant_delegation/plague_rumour/foreign_gift/mineral_vein/religious_revival). Each event shows title, description, and two choices with resource/morale tradeoffs. Player resolves via Quest panel. Auto-expires to choice B after 2 minutes. History log shows last 4 decisions. POLITICAL_EVENT event. state.politicalEvents saved/loaded. Save version 24.
notes: Created src/systems/politicalEvents.js: SPAWN_MIN=1200/SPAWN_MAX=2400 ticks (5-10 min); EXPIRE_TICKS=480 (2 min); 8 EVENTS (harvest_festival/tax_dispute/desertion_crisis/merchant_delegation/plague_rumour/foreign_gift/mineral_vein/religious_revival) each with id/icon/title/desc/choiceA/choiceB (label/effect/cost/gain/morale). initPoliticalEvents() idempotent guard on state.politicalEvents; politicalEventTick() auto-expires via _applyChoice(ev,'b',true) and spawns via _spawnEvent() on schedule; _spawnEvent() picks random event, sets state.politicalEvents.pending with expiresAt, logs message, emits POLITICAL_EVENT; resolvePoliticalEvent(choice) validates, deducts cost, applies gains+morale, logs entry, resets pending+schedules next; getPoliticalEventSecsLeft() for countdown. core/state.js: politicalEvents:null + reset in initState(). core/events.js: POLITICAL_EVENT constant. ui/questPanel.js: Added resolvePoliticalEvent/getPoliticalEventSecsLeft imports; subscribed POLITICAL_EVENT→render; TICK handler refreshes when pending event (alongside challenge); click delegate for [data-pol-choice] buttons calls resolvePoliticalEvent + shows btn--shake on error; _politicalEventSection() renders section header, pending-event card (title/desc/two choice cards with affordability-gated buttons + countdown timer urgent at <30s), or waiting state; history log shows last 4 entries; injected at top of render() before _challengeSection(). main.js: registerSystem(politicalEventTick) as 15th system; initPoliticalEvents() in boot+_newGame; politicalEvents persisted in _save()/_applySave(). CSS: .pol-event-section (accent border), .pol-event-header, .pol-event-timer/--urgent, .pol-event-card, .pol-event-title/.desc, .pol-event-choices (flex wrap), .pol-event-choice (card), .pol-event-choice__label/effect, .btn--pol-choice (amber), .pol-event-log/__header/__entry, .pol-event-waiting.

title: terrain combat modifiers
description: Per-terrain attack/defense multipliers in combat resolution. Mountain: ATK ×0.85, DEF ×1.25. Hills: DEF ×1.15. Forest: ATK ×1.10, DEF ×1.05. River: ATK ×0.95, DEF ×1.10. Grass/capital: no modifier. Shown in combat preview modal and tile hover tooltip.
notes: systems/combat.js: Added TERRAIN_COMBAT_MODS constant (mountain/hills/forest/river/grass/capital) and _terrainMod() helper. In getAttackPreview(): attackPower *= terrainMod.attackMult; effectiveDefense = tile.defense * terrainMod.defMult; winChance uses effectiveDefense; returns effectiveDefense+terrainMod fields. In attackTile(): same terrain attack mult applied before siege/mana-bolt override; effectiveDefense computed after siege sets defense=0 (so 0×anything=0, siege still guaranteed); effectiveDefense passed to _victory()/_defeat() for accurate history/log. ui/mapPanel.js: Added _TERRAIN_MOD_LABELS constant (human-readable descriptions) and _terrainModHtml() helper; _showCombatPreview() shows effective defense (with base in parentheses when different) + .cp-terrain-mod notice badge above siege/formation notices; _showTileTip() shows terrain combat modifier hint row for non-player tiles. styles/main.css: .cp-terrain-mod modifier class (blue tint, lighter border than gold siege notices).

title: age council boons (one-time permanent bonus chosen on age advancement)
description: When advancing to Bronze/Iron/Medieval Age, a council modal offers 3 random boons from an age-specific pool of 5. Player picks 1 permanent bonus. Boon types: rate/cap bonuses, combat attack bonus, pop cap, counterattack penalty. Modal is dismissible (skip = no reward).
notes: Created src/data/ageBoons.js: AGE_BOON_POOLS keyed by age index (1/2/3); 5 boons per age — Bronze: fertile_lands (+1.5 food/s), logging_mastery (+1.5 wood/s), stone_quarrying (+1.5 stone/s), bronze_weapons (+10% combat), settlers_spirit (+100 pop cap); Iron: iron_discipline (+15% combat), merchant_networks (+2 gold/s), iron_reserves (+1.5 iron/s +200 iron cap), advanced_farming (+2.5 food/s), ley_lines (+1 mana/s); Medieval: grand_tactics (+25% combat), royal_granaries (+3 food/s), imperial_mint (+3 gold/s), castle_walls (−20% enemy counterattack), arcane_mastery (+2 mana/s); BOONS flat lookup. Created src/ui/councilModal.js: showCouncilModal(age, offer, onChoose) creates #council-modal; renders 3 boon cards (button, icon, name, desc); click→onChoose(boonId)+hide; Escape/Skip button dismiss without reward. core/state.js: added councilBoons:[] to static object + initState() reset. core/events.js: COUNCIL_BOON_CHOSEN added. core/actions.js: imported BOONS; added chooseCouncilBoon(boonId) — validates not duplicate, pushes to state.councilBoons, calls recalcRates(), emits COUNCIL_BOON_CHOSEN+RESOURCE_CHANGED, logs message. systems/combat.js: imported BOONS; added _councilBoonCombatMult() (sums effect.combatAttack fractions → 1+bonus multiplier); applied in both getAttackPreview() and attackTile() after conqueror archetype. systems/resources.js: imported BOONS; added boon rateBonus+capBonus loop after relic bonuses in recalcRates(). systems/enemyAI.js: imported BOONS; castle_walls check (×0.80 on winChance) after aegis spell. systems/population.js: imported BOONS; settlers_spirit check in _recalcCap(); subscribed COUNCIL_BOON_CHOSEN→_recalcCap. main.js: imported showCouncilModal/AGE_BOON_POOLS/chooseCouncilBoon; expanded AGE_CHANGED listener to pick 3 random boons from pool and call showCouncilModal (only for age>0); councilBoons saved/loaded; save version 23→24. styles/main.css: .council-modal/.council-modal--hidden/.council-box/.council-header/.council-sub/.council-boons/.council-boon/--icon/--body/--name/--desc/.council-skip; mobile: flex-wrap.

title: mercenary contracts system
description: Random mercenary offers appear in the Military panel every 5-8 minutes (one at a time, 60s window). Offers show a unit type, cost (2.5x base gold), hire button. Hiring is instant (no training queue), no upkeep. MERCENARY_CHANGED event. state.mercenaries saved/loaded. Save version 25.

Added mercenaries:null to state.js + initState() reset. main.js: imported initMercenaries/mercenaryTick; registerSystem(mercenaryTick) 16th system; initMercenaries() in boot+_newGame; mercenaries in _save()/_applySave(); save version 24→25. militaryPanel.js: imported hireMercenary/mercenarySecsLeft; subscribed MERCENARY_CHANGED→render; TICK handler extended with hasMercOffer check (refreshes every 16 ticks while offer active); _mercenarySection() injected first in _render() — renders gold-accent card with unit icon/name/ATK+DEF stats, seconds countdown (red pulse <20s), gold Hire button; hire-merc action in _handleClick() (btn--shake on error). CSS: .merc-offer (gold left-border, pop-in animation), .merc-offer__header/.title/.timer/--urgent, .merc-offer__body/.icon/.info/.name/.stats, .btn--hire-merc (gold gradient), .merc-offer__sub.

title: alliance resource gifts from AI empires
description: Allied empires periodically (every 5-7 minutes) send resource gifts based on their specialty: Iron Horde sends iron+food, Mage Council sends mana+gold, Sea Wolves send wood+food. Gift amounts scale with game tick. Logged as 'windfall' + diplomatic history 'gift' entry. Gift timing shown in empire card when allied. No save version bump needed (nextGiftTick lives inside state.diplomacy).

No save version bump — nextGiftTick is nested inside state.diplomacy which is already persisted.

title: tech synergy bonuses (6 cross-tech permanent bonuses)
description: When two compatible technologies are both researched, a synergy bonus permanently activates. 6 synergies: veteran_legion (warcraft+tactics, +20% combat attack), runic_forging (alchemy+steel, +2 iron/s), trade_empire (navigation+economics, +0.8 gold/s per trade route), sacred_harvest (divine_favor+agriculture, +50% farm food), fortress_doctrine (fortification+tactics, −25% enemy counterattack success), naval_engineering (engineering+navigation, +2 wood/s +300 wood cap). Synergies computed dynamically (no extra state). SYNERGY_UNLOCKED event + log message on unlock. Synergy cards in Research panel showing locked/unlocked states.
notes: Added SYNERGIES constant (6 entries) + SYNERGY_ORDER to data/techs.js. Added SYNERGY_UNLOCKED to events.js. systems/research.js: added _checkSynergies(techId) called in researchTick() after _checkMasteries — iterates SYNERGIES, checks if new tech is in the pair, checks if both are done, logs '✨ Synergy unlocked: name! effect' + emits SYNERGY_UNLOCKED. systems/resources.js: added _synergy() helper; runic_forging +2 iron/s in baseline; naval_engineering +2 wood/s +300 wood cap; trade_empire +0.8 gold/s per open trade route inside trade route loop; sacred_harvest ×1.5 in _buildingProdMultiplier for farm. systems/combat.js: added _synergy() helper; veteran_legion ×1.20 in getAttackPreview() and attackTile() after military mastery; returns veteranLegion flag in preview. systems/enemyAI.js: fortress_doctrine ×0.75 on winChance after castle_walls boon. ui/researchPanel.js: imported SYNERGIES+SYNERGY_ORDER; subscribed SYNERGY_UNLOCKED→render; added _synergiesSection() rendering .synergy-grid with per-synergy cards — active (purple border+badge, green tech icons) vs locked (dimmed); injected between mastery section and policy section. CSS: .synergy-section/.synergy-section__header/count/intro, .synergy-grid (auto-fill 220px), .synergy-card/--active/--locked, .synergy-card__header/.synergy-icon/.synergy-name/.synergy-badge (purple pill), .synergy-techs/.synergy-tech/--done/.synergy-plus, .synergy-effect/--active/--locked.

title: weather system — periodic climate events affecting resource rates
description: Weather events fire every 4-6 minutes, lasting 60-90 seconds. 5 weather types: Clear Skies (+10% all positive rates, 60s), Heavy Rain (+25% food, -10% wood, 75s), Scorching Heat (-15% food, +15% gold, 60s), Windstorm (+25% wood, -10% stone/iron, 60s), Snowstorm (-20% all positive rates, -5 morale, 90s). Weather applied in recalcRates() after seasons. Weather badge in title bar with icon+name. WEATHER_CHANGED event. state.weather saved/loaded. Save version 26.
notes: Created src/data/weather.js: WEATHER_TYPES array (5 entries: clear_skies/heavy_rain/scorching_heat/windstorm/snowstorm) each with id/icon/name/desc/weight/duration/modifiers/moraleDelta?/logType. Created src/systems/weather.js: GRACE_TICKS=480 (no weather first 2min); _pickWeather() weighted random; initWeather() idempotent struct guard; weatherTick() expires active (logs 'passed', recalcRates, WEATHER_CHANGED); spawns new when cooldown+grace clear (_spawnWeather: changeMorale if moraleDelta, addMessage, recalcRates, WEATHER_CHANGED); getCurrentWeather()/getWeatherSecsLeft() helpers. CSS: .weather-badge (pill shape, var(--bg-card) background, cursor:help, white-space:nowrap); hidden on ≤600px. Tech synergy section CSS also added: .synergy-* classes.

title: barbarian grand siege events
description: When 3+ barbarian camps coexist and a 12-minute cooldown has elapsed, the horde organises a Grand Siege on the capital. A 30-second warning fires first (message + HUD badge). Player power (units+hero+techs) vs combined camp defenses (55% threshold): repel → all camps destroyed + gold/food/iron loot + morale +15; struck → gold/food penalty + morale -20. #siege-badge pulses red during warning. BARBARIAN_SIEGE event. Save-compatible via migration guards in initBarbarians().
notes: Rewrote src/systems/barbarianCamps.js: added SIEGE_THRESHOLD=3, SIEGE_WARN_TICKS=120 (30s), SIEGE_INTERVAL=2880 (12min), SIEGE_WIN_RATIO=0.55, SIEGE_REPEL_LOOT={gold:200,food:100,iron:50}; imported UNITS + changeMorale; initBarbarians() now adds nextSiegeTick+siegeWarning to state.barbarians with migration guards; barbarianTick() calls _siegeCheck(campCount) after spawn logic; _siegeCheck() sets siegeWarning on threshold met (warning message + BARBARIAN_SIEGE{type:warning} + MAP_CHANGED) and fires _launchSiege() when tick>=siegeWarning; _launchSiege() computes _playerPower() (units*attack+hero30+techs) vs _barbarianPower() (sum barbarian tile defenses) — repelled: clears all camps+awards loot+changeMorale(+15)+RESOURCE_CHANGED; struck: deducts gold/food+changeMorale(-20); exported getSiegeSecsLeft(). Added BARBARIAN_SIEGE to events.js. main.js: added getSiegeSecsLeft import from barbarianCamps.js (consolidated single import); BUILDINGS import added; initPrestige()+_updateSiegeBadge()+_updatePrestigeBadge() calls in boot+_newGame; _updateSiegeBadge() shows/hides #siege-badge with countdown; registered BARBARIAN_SIEGE+TICK/4 for badge refresh. index.html: <span id=siege-badge style=display:none>. CSS: @keyframes siege-pulse (opacity 1→0.55→1 1s), .siege-badge (red border/bg #fc8181 text, animation, hidden ≤600px).

title: empire prestige system — permanent milestone bonuses
description: Cumulative prestige score earned through: age advance (+100×age), wonders (+200), battle victories (+5), alliances (+50), quests (+30), tech mastery (+100), synergy (+75). Five milestones unlock permanent production bonuses: 500→+1 gold/s; 1000→+1 food/s +1 wood/s; 2000→+200 all caps; 3500→+2 gold/s +1 iron/s +1 mana/s; 5000→all positive rates ×1.15. state.prestige={score,milestones[]}. #prestige-badge shows ✨ score in title bar. PRESTIGE_CHANGED event. Save version 27.
notes: Created src/systems/prestige.js: PRESTIGE_MILESTONES array (5 entries with threshold/name/icon/bonusDesc); initPrestige() idempotent struct guard; awardPrestige(amount,reason) adds score+_checkMilestones+emits PRESTIGE_CHANGED+addMessage; getPrestigeScore() helper; _checkMilestones() iterates milestones pushing thresholds reached + achievement message. CSS: .prestige-badge (purple #b794f4 pill badge), .prestige-badge:hover, hidden ≤600px.

title: player-initiated diplomatic gift sending
description: Allow the player to send gold gifts to neutral or allied empires to improve relations. Small (50g, 30% alliance chance for neutral empires) and Large (150g, 70% alliance chance). Per-empire 30-second cooldown. Gift section shown in each empire card. No save version bump needed (playerGiftCooldownUntil lives in state.diplomacy.empires entries).

Added playerGiftCooldownUntil:0 to initial empire entry in initDiplomacy(); migration guard in initDiplomacy() for older saves. sendGift(empireId, size) validates relations (war=rejected), cooldown, gold; deducts cost; sets per-empire cooldown; neutral+roll<chance → immediate alliance (DIPLOMACY_CHANGED{allied}); neutral+roll>=chance → goodwill logged; allied → appreciation logged. ui/diplomacyPanel.js: imported sendGift+GIFT_* constants; added _giftRow(emp) helper rendering .dipl-gift-row with Small/Large buttons (gold-tinted .btn--gift) when not on cooldown, or cooldown countdown badge; injected into _empireCard() between warScoreHtml and actions div; TICK throttle now also checks hasGiftCooldown (re-renders while any gift cooldown is active); sendGift case added to _onClick(). styles/main.css: .dipl-gift-row (flex wrap), .dipl-gift-label (dim), .dipl-gift-cd (yellow), .btn--gift (amber border/bg/hover).

title: hero injury and recovery system
description: When the player loses a battle and the hero is recruited, 20% chance the hero is injured. Injured heroes contribute no combat bonuses and cannot use abilities for a 5-minute (1200 ticks) recovery period. Military panel shows a progress bar during recovery. Auto-recovers when tick reaches recoveryUntil. No save version bump needed (hero.injured / hero.recoveryUntil are new optional hero fields).
notes: systems/combat.js: Added HERO_INJURY_CHANCE=0.20, HERO_RECOVERY_TICKS=1200 constants. _heroInjured() helper: returns false if not injured; if injured + tick>=recoveryUntil auto-clears injury, logs recovery message, emits HERO_CHANGED; else returns true. getAttackPreview(): hero bonus block now guarded by !_heroInjured(); siegeActive check also respects injury; preview returns heroInjured field. attackTile(): hero bonus block guarded by !_heroInjured(); Siege Master check guarded by !state.hero.injured. _defeat(): after changeMorale, if hero recruited + not already injured + random()<HERO_INJURY_CHANCE: sets hero.injured=true, hero.recoveryUntil=tick+1200, emits HERO_CHANGED, logs "🩹 Champion was injured" hero-type message. ui/militaryPanel.js: _heroActiveSection() checks h.injured+now<recoveryUntil first; renders .hero-card--injured recovery card with red-tinted border, .hero-injured-msg warning, .hero-recovery-wrap with gradient progress bar (fill=pct complete) and time countdown; falls through to normal hero UI when healthy. TICK handler: added h.injured to hasHeroActivity check so panel refreshes every 16 ticks during recovery. styles/main.css: .hero-card--injured (red border+bg tint), .hero-card__badge--injured (red pill), .hero-injured-msg (red 12px), .hero-recovery-wrap/.hero-recovery-bar-outer/.hero-recovery-bar-fill (red→green gradient), .hero-recovery-time (dim right-aligned).

title: empire decree system — player-activated strategic abilities with cooldowns

DECREE_USED event. Save version 28.
notes: Created src/data/decrees.js: DECREES array (5 entries: conscription/emergency_levy/harvest_edict/war_banner/scholars_edict) each with id/icon/name/desc/cost/cooldownTicks/durationTicks?/charges?. Created src/systems/decrees.js: initDecrees() idempotent struct guard; decreesTick() expires harvestEdictExpires+recalcRates+message+DECREE_USED; canUseDecree(id) checks cooldown+resources+special conditions; useDecree(id) deducts cost+sets cooldown+applies effect via _applyConscription/_applyEmergencyLevy/_applyHarvestEdict/_applyWarBanner/_applyScholarsEdict; getDecreeSecsLeft()/isHarvestEdictActive()/getWarBannerCharges() helpers. Added DECREE_USED to events.js. Added decrees:null to state.js static + initState() reset. resources.js: harvest_edict check before Object.assign (food+wood *1.40 when active). combat.js: war_banner check in both getAttackPreview and attackTile (attackPower*1.40); consume charge each attack + message when exhausted; warBannerCharges in preview return. main.js: imported initDecrees+decreesTick; registerSystem(decreesTick) 19th system; initDecrees() in boot+_newGame; decrees:state.decrees in _save(); state.decrees=s.decrees??null in _applySave(); save version bumped 27→28. militaryPanel.js: imported useDecree+canUseDecree+getDecreeSecsLeft+isHarvestEdictActive+getWarBannerCharges from decrees.js + DECREES from data/decrees.js; added DECREE_USED subscription+tick hasDecreeCooldown check; _decreesSection() renders .decrees-section with 5 .decree-card entries showing status/cost/countdown+Enact button; _handleClick use-decree case calls useDecree(id); _escHtml helper added. title: 10 new achievements — late-game milestones
description: Add 10 achievements: siege_repelled (repel grand siege), all_relics (all 6 relics), prestige_1000 (1000 prestige), elite_unit (unit reaches elite rank), weathered (survive snowstorm with morale>0), treasury (all 6 resources >=80% cap), speed_builder (Bronze Age in 8min), veteran_army (3+ veteran/elite units), mercenary_lord (hire 3 mercenaries), decree_master (use all 5 decrees). Add totalHired tracking to mercenaries. TOTAL_ACHIEVEMENTS 15→25.
notes: achievements.js: added 10 ACHIEVEMENTS entries (siege_repelled/all_relics/prestige_1000/elite_unit/weathered/treasury/speed_builder/veteran_army/mercenary_lord/decree_master). Added _lastWeatherType and _decreesUsed module vars; reset in initAchievements(). New event listeners: BARBARIAN_SIEGE(repelled→_checkAndUnlock siege_repelled), RELIC_DISCOVERED(all_relics), PRESTIGE_CHANGED(prestige_1000), WEATHER_CHANGED(track lastWeatherType; on clear if was snowstorm+morale>0→weathered), DECREE_USED(activated→add to _decreesUsed set+decree_master). Extended existing listeners: UNIT_CHANGED+veteran_army+mercenary_lord; MAP_CHANGED+veteran_army+elite_unit; AGE_CHANGED+speed_builder; RESOURCE_CHANGED+treasury. _predicate: siege_repelled/weathered return true (event-gated); all_relics checks RELIC_ORDER all discovered; prestige_1000 checks score>=1000; elite_unit checks any unitRank==elite; treasury checks all 6 resources>=80% cap; speed_builder checks age>=1 && tick<=1920; veteran_army counts ranked units>=3; mercenary_lord checks totalHired>=3; decree_master checks all DECREES ids in _decreesUsed set. mercenaries.js: added totalHired:0 to initial state; migration guard in initMercenaries(); incremented totalHired in hireMercenary(). summaryPanel.js: TOTAL_ACHIEVEMENTS 15→25. Imports added: RELIC_ORDER from data/relics.js, DECREES from data/decrees.js.

title: delivery contracts system
description: Every 8-10 minutes, 2 random delivery contracts appear in the Market tab. Each contract specifies resources to deliver in exchange for a gold reward. Player accepts a contract (resources deducted immediately), waits 60s processing time, then collects the gold reward. One active contract at a time. Shows offer cards with resource requirements and reward, active contract progress bar, and countdown to next refresh. 8 contract templates across all resource types. Completing contracts earns prestige (+20) and increments totalTrades. CONTRACTS_CHANGED event. state.contracts saved/loaded.
notes: Created src/systems/contracts.js: CONTRACT_POOL of 8 templates (grain_export/timber_supply/stone_contract/iron_trade/mana_export/mixed_supply/arms_contract/arcane_deal); initContracts() idempotent init with migration guards; contractsTick() handles offer spawning (every 8-10 min / 1920-2400 ticks when Market built and no active contract) and contract completion; acceptContract(idx) validates resources, deducts them, starts 60s processing countdown; cancelContract() forfeits resources; contractsRefreshSecs()/contractProgress()/contractSecsLeft() helpers. _completeContract() awards reward resources, totalCompleted++, awardPrestige(20), increments market.totalTrades. Updated src/ui/marketPanel.js: added CONTRACTS_CHANGED subscription; TICK handler refreshes when active; _contractsSection() renders offer cards (with affordability check, red deliver/green reward), active progress bar with countdown, and "waiting" state with refresh timer; _handleClick handles accept-contract and cancel-contract data-actions. Added CONTRACTS_CHANGED + HERO_EXPEDITION events to events.js. state.contracts added to state.js initState(). main.js: contractsTick registered, initContracts() called in boot+_newGame, contracts saved/loaded (save version 29). CSS: .contracts-section/.contracts-header/.contract-offers grid/.contract-offer cards (red deliver, green reward), .contract-active progress bar (green gradient), .btn--contract-accept (green), .btn--contract-cancel (red), .contract-waiting, mobile single-column.

title: hero training expedition
description: When the Champion hero is recruited, healthy (not injured), and not on cooldown, the player can send them on a 2-3 minute training expedition. During the expedition the hero is unavailable for combat (no attack bonus, no abilities). On return: hero gains 2 combatWins (triggering skill level-up if threshold reached) and has a 25% chance of 100-200 gold bonus loot. Military panel shows expedition progress bar and Recall button. heroSystem.js handles expedition tick logic. HERO_CHANGED event emitted on departure and return. state.hero.expedition = {active, endsAt} field added. Save version 29.
notes: Created src/systems/heroSystem.js: sendOnExpedition() validates hero healthy+not on expedition, randomises 2-3 min duration (480-720 ticks), stores {active, startedAt, endsAt, totalTicks} in state.hero.expedition, logs departure message, emits HERO_CHANGED+HERO_EXPEDITION; recallExpedition() clears expedition with no reward; heroTick() checks completion — awards EXPEDITION_WIN_CREDIT=2 combatWins (checking for skill level-up milestone via HERO_SKILL_WIN_INTERVAL), 25% chance of 100-200 gold bonus, logs return message, emits HERO_CHANGED+HERO_EXPEDITION; expeditionProgress() uses startedAt+totalTicks for accurate fraction; expeditionSecsLeft() for countdown. Updated src/systems/combat.js: added _heroOnExpedition() helper; all three hero bonus blocks (getAttackPreview ×2 + attackTile) now guard with !_heroOnExpedition() alongside !_heroInjured(); Siege Master check also guards expedition. Updated src/ui/militaryPanel.js: imported heroSystem exports; _heroActiveSection() checks expedition.active first — renders orange-tinted expedition card with progress bar, countdown, Recall button, and skills section; added "Send on Expedition" button to healthy hero card; _handleClick handles expedition-send and expedition-recall actions; TICK handler adds h.expedition?.active to hasHeroActivity check for countdown refresh. main.js: heroTick registered as tick system; hero.expedition migration guard in _applySave. CSS: .hero-card--expedition (orange border+tint), .hero-card__badge--expedition (orange pill), .hero-expedition-msg, .hero-expedition-bar-outer/fill (orange gradient), .hero-expedition-time, .btn--expedition-recall (red), .btn--expedition-send (orange).

title: wandering merchant events — periodic merchant with 3 random item offers
description: Every 8-12 minutes a wandering merchant visits and offers 3 random items (resources, units, research boosts, map reveals, etc.) for gold. Player can buy one offer before merchant departs in 90s.
notes: Created src/systems/merchant.js: ITEM_POOL of 11 item types (resource/barter/research/morale/warbanner/reveal/unit/spell). initMerchant() idempotent init; merchantTick() spawns offer every 8-12 min (VISIT_MIN/MAX_TICKS=1920-2880), expires after 90s (STAY_TICKS=360); buyMerchantItem(idx) validates affordability (gold for most, food+wood barter for gold_stash), deducts cost, applies effect, closes offer (one purchase per visit); merchantSecsLeft()/merchantNextVisitSecs()/canAffordItem() helpers. Added MERCHANT_CHANGED to events.js. Added merchant:null to state.js static + initState(). ui/marketPanel.js: imported merchant functions; added MERCHANT_CHANGED subscription + TICK refresh when offer active; _merchantSection() renders .merchant-section--active with 3 item cards (icon/title/cost/desc/Purchase btn) + countdown timer when active, or next-visit countdown when absent; handles merchant-buy data-action in _handleClick. main.js: imported initMerchant+merchantTick; registerSystem(merchantTick); initMerchant() in boot+_newGame; merchant saved/loaded (save version 29→30). CSS: .merchant-section (purple border-left #9f7aea), --active pulse animation, .merchant-items grid (auto-fill 160px), .merchant-item/--poor cards, .merchant-item__header/icon/title/cost/desc, .btn--merchant-buy (purple hover), .merchant-waiting, mobile single-column.

title: border skirmishes — AI vs AI conflict events with player exploitation opportunities
description: Two AI empires occasionally enter a border skirmish lasting 3-5 minutes. During skirmish both empires are weakened (player gets +20% win chance attacking them). Player can Mediate the conflict (requires 2 alliances) for gold + prestige.
notes: Modified src/systems/diplomacy.js: Added SKIRMISH constants (SKIRMISH_INTERVAL_MIN/MAX=15-20min, SKIRMISH_DURATION_MIN/MAX=3-5min), exported SKIRMISH_ATTACK_BONUS=0.20, MEDIATE_MIN_ALLIANCES=2, MEDIATE_GOLD_REWARD=150, MEDIATE_PRESTIGE=50. Updated initDiplomacy() to add skirmish:null and nextSkirmishTick to state.diplomacy; migration guards for older saves. Added _skirmishTick() called from diplomacyTick(): on expiry emits BORDER_SKIRMISH{mediated/resolved}, logs messages, schedules next skirmish; on spawn picks 2 random non-war empires, creates skirmish object, logs arrival message. Added exported API: isSkirmishActive(), getSkirmish(), skirmishSecsLeft(), mediateSkirmish() (validates 2 alliances, sets endsAt=now for immediate resolution), isEmpireInSkirmish(empireId). Added _skirmishInterval() helper. Added BORDER_SKIRMISH to events.js. src/systems/combat.js: imported isEmpireInSkirmish+SKIRMISH_ATTACK_BONUS from diplomacy.js; getAttackPreview: skirmish bonus check before return (winChance+0.20 when tile.owner in skirmish, returns skirmishBonus field); attackTile: same check with addMessage about +20% advantage. ui/diplomacyPanel.js: imported new exports; added BORDER_SKIRMISH listener+isSkirmishActive check in TICK handler; _skirmishBanner() renders .skirmish-banner with header/desc/timer/mediate button; _empireCard() shows dipl-badge--skirmish badge on skirmishing empires; added mediateSkirmish case to _onClick(). main.js: imported MEDIATE_PRESTIGE from diplomacy.js; added BORDER_SKIRMISH listener calling awardPrestige(MEDIATE_PRESTIGE). CSS: .skirmish-banner (orange border-left pulse animation), .skirmish-banner__header/title/timer/desc/actions, .btn--mediate (green border), .skirmish-mediated, .dipl-badge--skirmish (orange pill badge).

title: special map landmarks — 5 unique legendary sites with permanent bonuses
description: Five legendary landmark sites (Ancient Temple, Golden Fields, Ancient Quarry, Dragon's Hoard, Titan Forge) are placed on the map during generation at distance 4–12 from capital. Each reveals a ★ marker on the canvas once fog is cleared. Capturing the tile grants a permanent rate/cap bonus (mana, food, stone, gold, iron). Landmarks listed in Research panel. LANDMARK_CAPTURED event. +150 prestige on capture. state.landmarks saved/loaded. Save version 31.
notes: Created src/data/landmarks.js: 5 LANDMARK definitions with id/icon/name/desc/mapLabel/defenseBonus/bonus(rates+caps); LANDMARK_ORDER array. systems/map.js: imported LANDMARKS/LANDMARK_ORDER; added _placeLandmarks(tiles) — picks 5 neutral tiles at dist 4–12, assigns tile.landmark=id, boosts defense; called from initMap() + sets state.landmarks={captured:{}}. systems/combat.js: imported LANDMARKS; added _tryCaptureLandmark(tile,x,y) called in _victory() after relic check; records tick in state.landmarks.captured[id], calls recalcRates(), logs windfall message, emits LANDMARK_CAPTURED+RESOURCE_CHANGED. systems/resources.js: imported LANDMARKS; added landmark bonus loop in recalcRates() after relic loop — applies def.bonus.rates+def.bonus.caps for all captured landmarks. ui/mapPanel.js: imported LANDMARKS; added landmark ★ glyph drawing in _drawTile() on tile.landmark tiles not yet player-owned; added lmHtml block in _showTileTip() showing landmark name/bonus hint or 'captured' badge; subscribed LANDMARK_CAPTURED→_render. ui/researchPanel.js: imported LANDMARKS+LANDMARK_ORDER; subscribed LANDMARK_CAPTURED→render; added _landmarksSection() with relic-card styled grid showing captured (gold border, bonus pills) vs locked (★ icon, bonus hint) states; injected at end of panel. ui/summaryPanel.js: imported LANDMARK_ORDER; added 🗺️ Landmarks X/5 row in _progressionCard(); subscribed LANDMARK_CAPTURED+BUILDING_SPECIALIZED→_render. core/events.js: LANDMARK_CAPTURED+'landmarkCaptured' added. core/state.js: landmarks:null + reset in initState(); buildingSpecials:{} reset too. main.js: landmarks+buildingSpecials in _save()/_applySave(); save version bumped to 31; LANDMARK_CAPTURED listener awardPrestige(150).

title: building specializations — permanent one-time upgrades for 4 core buildings
description: Farm, Lumber Mill, Barracks, and Quarry each have 2 specialization options. One specialization can be applied per building slot for a one-time gold cost. Specializations are permanent. Farm: Granary (+200 food cap, -10% food) or Market Garden (+30% food, +0.5 gold/s). Lumber Mill: Timber Mill (+40% wood) or Charcoal Forge (+0.5 iron/s, -20% wood, requires metalworking). Barracks: Training Grounds (-25% training time) or Armory (+15% combat, requires metalworking). Quarry: Deep Quarry (+40% stone) or Iron Quarry (+30% stone, +0.5 iron/s, requires metalworking). BUILDING_SPECIALIZED event. state.buildingSpecials saved/loaded.
notes: Created src/data/buildingSpecials.js: SPECIALIZATIONS object (8 entries across 4 buildings), SPECIALS_BY_BUILDING lookup, ELIGIBLE_BUILDINGS list. core/events.js: BUILDING_SPECIALIZED event added. core/state.js: buildingSpecials:{} field + reset in initState(). core/actions.js: imported SPECIALIZATIONS; added specializeBuilding(buildingId, specId) — validates building exists, no existing spec, tech/age requirements, affordability; deducts cost, sets state.buildingSpecials[id], calls recalcRates(), emits BUILDING_SPECIALIZED+BUILDING_CHANGED+RESOURCE_CHANGED; Training Grounds -25% applied in trainUnit() via state.buildingSpecials.barracks==='training_grounds' check. systems/resources.js: imported SPECIALIZATIONS; updated building loop to apply specDef.prodMult per resource when specialization exists; added rateBonus+capBonus from specDef after per-resource loop. systems/combat.js: added Armory +15% in both getAttackPreview() and attackTile() after council boon mult. ui/buildingPanel.js: imported specializeBuilding+SPECIALIZATIONS+SPECIALS_BY_BUILDING+ELIGIBLE_BUILDINGS; subscribed BUILDING_SPECIALIZED→render; added _specializationsSection() at bottom of panel showing eligible owned buildings — active-spec card (gold border, badge) or two option cards with cost/desc/Specialize button (gated by affordability+tech reqs); delegated specialize action in panel.onclick. CSS: .spec-section (amber border-left), .spec-section__header/intro, .spec-card/--active, .spec-card__header/desc/title, .spec-badge, .spec-options flex column, .spec-option, .spec-option__header/icon/name/cost, .spec-cost--ok/bad, .spec-option__desc, .btn--specialize (amber gradient).

title: faction alliance bonuses — passive empire-specific perks when allied
description: When allied with each AI empire, gain unique passive bonuses. Iron Horde: +20% combat attack power. Mage Council: +1 mana/s, +30% faster research. Sea Wolves: +1 gold/s, +40% trade route income. Effects wired into resources.js (rates), combat.js (attack), research.js (research speed). Alliance bonus label shown in diplomacy panel empire card when allied. No save version bump needed — bonuses computed dynamically from existing state.diplomacy.
notes: data/empires.js: Added allianceBonus object to each empire — ironHorde {combat:0.20, label:'...'}, mageCouncil {manaRate:1.0, researchSpeed:0.70, label:'...'}, seaWolves {goldRate:1.0, tradeIncomeMult:1.40, label:'...'}. systems/resources.js: Trade route loop now applies allyTradeMult=EMPIRES[emp.id]?.allianceBonus?.tradeIncomeMult??1.0 to Sea Wolves trade gift income; added flat alliance rate bonus loop after trade route block (mana+=1.0 for mageCouncil, gold+=1.0 for seaWolves). systems/combat.js: Added Iron Horde allied check (attackPower*=1.20) in both getAttackPreview() and attackTile() after Armory specialization, before War Banner. systems/research.js: Added Mage Council allied check in startResearch() — totalTicks*=0.70 for 30% faster research. ui/diplomacyPanel.js: Added allianceBonusHtml local var in _empireCard(); renders .dipl-alliance-bonus row with empire's label when allied; injected between tradeHtml and warScoreHtml. styles/main.css: Added .dipl-alliance-bonus (border-top, dim text) and .dipl-alliance-bonus strong (gold accent).

title: seasonal special events — one unique mid-season event per season cycle
description: A special event fires once per season at the halfway point (tick 180 of 360). Spring Festival: +60 food, +40 wood, +2 morale. Grand Tournament (Summer): +1 XP to all trained unit types (with possible promotions), +4 morale. Harvest Moon (Autumn): +80 food, +60 gold, +40 stone. Winter Solstice: +8 morale, +30 mana. All events shown as windfall toasts. SEASONAL_EVENT event added to events.js. seasonalEventFired boolean in state.season (migration guard in initSeasons). No save version bump needed.
notes: core/events.js: Added SEASONAL_EVENT:'seasonalEvent'. systems/seasons.js: Added SEASON_MID=180 constant; imported changeMorale from morale.js and UNITS from data/units.js. initSeasons() initialises seasonalEventFired:false and has migration guard for old saves. seasonTick() checks tick===SEASON_MID && !seasonalEventFired → fires _fireSeasonalEvent(seasonIndex), sets seasonalEventFired=true; resets to false on season change. _fireSeasonalEvent() switch: Spring→+60food+40wood+2morale+windfall toast; Summer→_grantTournamentXP()+4morale+windfall toast; Autumn→+80food+60gold+40stone+windfall toast; Winter→+8morale+30mana+windfall toast; all emit SEASONAL_EVENT+RESOURCE_CHANGED. _addCapped() helper caps resource at state.caps. _grantTournamentXP() iterates state.units, grants +1 XP per unit type, promotes to veteran (3 XP) or elite (6 XP) with achievement messages, emits UNIT_CHANGED if any promoted. No save version bump — seasonalEventFired is nested inside state.season which is already persisted; migration guard handles old saves.

title: enemy faction capitals — capture for permanent peace and prestige
description: During map generation, designate one enemy settlement per faction as its capital (the tile farthest from the player's capital). Capitals get +40% defense. Canvas: 👑 crown icon replaces ⚔️ sword on capital tiles. Tile tooltip shows 'Faction Capital — Capture for peace!'. Capturing a capital: forces that faction to neutral relations, grants +10 morale, emits FACTION_CAPITAL_CAPTURED, adds special message. main.js listens and awards +150 prestige. tile.isFactionCapital field persisted automatically via state.map.tiles. No save version bump needed.
notes: core/events.js: Added FACTION_CAPITAL_CAPTURED:'factionCapitalCaptured'. systems/map.js: Added _designateFactionCapitals(tiles) called from initMap() after _placeEnemies; iterates all 3 factions (ironHorde/mageCouncil/seaWolves), finds the enemy settlement farthest from CAPITAL via Math.hypot, sets tile.isFactionCapital=factionId and boosts defense by ×1.4. systems/combat.js: Imported EMPIRES from data/empires.js; _victory() saves wasFactionCapital=tile.isFactionCapital at start (before owner mutation), clears tile.isFactionCapital=null; after _tryCaptureLandmark(), checks wasFactionCapital — forces diplomacy empire to neutral+resets warScore, calls changeMorale(10), emits FACTION_CAPITAL_CAPTURED+DIPLOMACY_CHANGED, adds surrender message; main victory message branch shows '👑 Capital captured!' text. ui/mapPanel.js: _drawTile() uses crown icon '👑' instead of '⚔️' for enemy tiles with isFactionCapital; _showTileTip() shows '👑 Faction Capital' in capitalLabel and ownerHtml, adds capitalHtml div with gold '👑 Capture for peace + prestige!' row. main.js: on(FACTION_CAPITAL_CAPTURED) calls awardPrestige(150). No save version bump — tile.isFactionCapital lives in state.map.tiles which is already persisted.

title: resource overflow bank — convert capped surplus to gold at 25% efficiency
description: When any non-gold resource is at 99%+ of its cap with a positive production rate, the surplus that would be wasted each tick is instead converted to gold at 25% efficiency. Tracked module-level in resources.js (no state persistence needed). HUD cells show a gold-border 'full' glow when at cap. HUD tooltip shows overflow→gold conversion rate for full resources, and shows overflow income sources in the gold tooltip. No new state fields or save version bump.
notes: systems/resources.js: Added module-level _overflowActive={food,wood,stone,iron,mana} tracking object. resourceTick(): inside the RESOURCE_KEYS loop, for non-gold resources with positive delta, computes overflow=max(0, (current+delta)-cap); if >0 accumulates overflowGold+=overflow*0.25 and sets _overflowActive[res]=true; after the loop, applies overflowGold to state.resources.gold (capped at gold cap). getBreakdown(): for gold resId, appends overflow source lines ({label:'Food overflow', value:rate*0.25}) for each non-gold resource at 99%+ cap with positive rate; for non-gold resId, computes overflowGoldRate=rate*0.25 if at cap+positive rate, returns it as new field. ui/hud.js: _showTooltip() builds overflowRow from breakdown.overflowGoldRate (gold text, '💰 Overflow → gold: +X.XX/s'); injected into tooltip HTML. renderHUD(): toggles .hud__resource--full class when r.id!=='gold' && val>=cap*0.99 && rate>0. styles/main.css: .hud-tt__modifier--overflow (gold #ffd700 text); .hud__resource--full (gold border-color+subtle box-shadow). No save version bump — overflow is fully computed from existing state on every tick.

title: tile improvement level 2 upgrades
description: All 5 tile improvements (Farm/Sawmill/Quarry/Mine/Dock) can be upgraded to Level 2 once the player reaches Iron Age. Level 2 doubles production. Requires Iron Age + higher resource cost. Level 2 badge ('2') drawn on canvas in gold. Upgrade option shown in tile picker modal. tile.improvementLevel field persists automatically in state.map.tiles. No save version bump needed.
notes: data/improvements.js: Added level2 sub-object to each of the 5 improvement definitions with name/icon/desc/upgradeCost/production (double the level-1 rates). Advanced Farm (+4 food/s, 80wood+50stone+60gold), Advanced Sawmill (+4 wood/s, 80stone+80gold), Advanced Quarry (+2 stone/s, 80gold+60wood), Advanced Mine (+2 iron/s, 100gold+50wood), Advanced Dock (+2 gold/s+2 food/s, 80wood+60stone+60gold). core/actions.js: Added upgradeTileImprovement(x,y) — validates player ownership, existing level-1 improvement, Iron Age (age>=2), affordability; deducts upgradeCost, sets tile.improvementLevel=2, calls recalcRates(), emits MAP_CHANGED+RESOURCE_CHANGED, logs build message. systems/map.js: Updated territoryRateBonus() — when tile.improvementLevel===2 uses impDef.level2.production instead of impDef.production. ui/mapPanel.js: Imported upgradeTileImprovement; added 'T095: Upgrade improvement button' case in picker click handler (data-imp-upgrade attr); _showImprovementPicker() — when tile has level-1 improvement, shows .imp-upgrade-section card with name/desc/costs/Upgrade button (disabled if not Iron Age or can't afford), or .imp-upgrade-locked note if pre-Iron Age; updated tile tooltip impHtml to show Lv.2 badge or '(upgradeable)' hint; _drawTile() draws bold gold '2' in bottom-right corner of level-2 improved tiles. styles/main.css: .imp-upgrade-section (amber border+bg), .imp-upgrade-label/.imp-upgrade-desc, .imp-upgrade-locked, .imp-lv2-badge (gold pill), .btn--imp-upgrade (amber gradient).

title: citizen role assignments
description: Players assign population groups to 4 roles: Scholars (-5% research time each), Merchants (+0.3 gold/s each), Workers (+4% production each), Soldiers (-5% training time each). Max total slots = floor(population / 100). Roles persist across new games. +/- buttons in Empire Summary card. state.citizenRoles. CITIZEN_ROLES_CHANGED event. Save version 32.
notes: core/events.js: Added CITIZEN_ROLES_CHANGED:'citizenRolesChanged'. core/state.js: Added citizenRoles:null (persists across new games, not in initState). core/actions.js: Added CITIZEN_ROLES constant (4 roles with icon/name/desc), CITIZEN_ROLE_ORDER array, adjustCitizenRole(role, delta) — validates role, initialises citizenRoles if needed, computes maxSlots=floor(pop/100), enforces bounds [0..max], calls recalcRates()+emits CITIZEN_ROLES_CHANGED+RESOURCE_CHANGED. systems/resources.js: After population income block, applies citizen role bonuses — merchants: rates.gold+=slots*0.3; workers: workerMult=1+slots*0.04 applied to all positive rates. systems/research.js: startResearch() applies scholarMult=max(0.50, 1-slots*0.05) to totalTicks when scholars>0. core/actions.js trainUnit(): applies soldierMult=max(0.50, 1-slots*0.05) after Training Grounds specialization. ui/summaryPanel.js: Imported CITIZEN_ROLES+CITIZEN_ROLE_ORDER+adjustCitizenRole; subscribed POPULATION_CHANGED+CITIZEN_ROLES_CHANGED→_render; added panel.onclick delegation for [data-citizen-role] buttons with btn--shake error feedback; added _citizenRolesCard() rendering header (slots counter), hint text, and 4 role rows (icon/name/count/+- buttons/desc) using grid layout; injected before _progressionCard() in _render(). main.js: citizenRoles in _save()/_applySave(); save version bumped 31→32. styles/main.css: .sum-citizen-header/title/slots/--full/hint, .sum-citizen-row (5-col grid), .sum-citizen-icon/name/count/btns/desc, .sum-citizen-btn (square icon-button), mobile hides desc column.

title: territorial expansion milestones
description: One-time resource + prestige rewards when player-owned tile count reaches 10 / 25 / 50 / 75 / 100. Tracked in state.expansionMilestones (persisted). Checked on every MAP_CHANGED event. No save version bump needed.
notes: main.js: Added EXPANSION_MILESTONES array (5 entries: thresholds 10/25/50/75/100 with resource rewards and prestige values). Added _checkExpansionMilestones() — counts player tiles, iterates milestones, awards resources (capped) + prestige, logs windfall message, marks threshold as awarded in state.expansionMilestones. Registered on(Events.MAP_CHANGED, _checkExpansionMilestones) in boot(). Added expansionMilestones to _save() (serialised as-is) and _applySave() (default {}). No save version bump — backwards-compatible default {}.

title: rally troops command
description: New military command in the Military panel: Rally (costs 50 gold + 25 mana) grants +1 XP to every trained unit type (may trigger veteran/elite rank promotions) and +5 morale. 5-minute cooldown. state.rallyState persists cooldown across saves.
notes: core/actions.js: Added RALLY_COST={gold:50,mana:25}, RALLY_COOLDOWN_TICKS=1200, RALLY_VETERAN_XP=3, RALLY_ELITE_XP=6 constants. Added rallyTroops() — validates hasUnits, checks cooldown (secsLeft in reason), checks canAfford, deducts cost, grants +1 XP to all trained unit types with rank-up promotion messages, boosts state.morale by +5 directly (avoiding circular import with morale.js), sets cooldownUntil, emits UNIT_CHANGED+MORALE_CHANGED+RESOURCE_CHANGED. ui/militaryPanel.js: Added rallyTroops to import; added _rallySection() rendering a card with cost display (color-coded by affordability), status line (ready/cooldown countdown/locked), and Rally button with data-action='rally'; inserted _rallySection() in _render() between _moraleSection() and _spellsSection(); added hasRallyCooldown check to tick handler so countdown refreshes; added 'rally' branch in _handleClick() with btn--shake error feedback. main.js: Added rallyState+expansionMilestones to _save() and _applySave(). styles/main.css: .rally-section, .rally-header, .rally-title, .rally-costs, .rally-desc, .rally-status (--ready/--cd/--locked), .btn--rally (purple gradient).

title: region dominance bonuses
description: When player controls 5+ tiles of a terrain type, gain a passive bonus: Grass→+1.5 food/s, Forest→+1.5 wood/s, Hills→+1.5 stone/s, River→+1 gold/s+1 food/s, Mountain→+1.5 iron/s. At 10+ tiles the bonus doubles. Computed dynamically from map each recalcRates(). Shown in Empire Summary as a 'Terrain Control' card with per-terrain row (count, threshold bar, bonus). No new state or save version bump needed.
notes: systems/map.js: Added getTerrainControl() export — counts player-owned tiles per terrain type (grass/forest/hills/river/mountain). systems/resources.js: Imported getTerrainControl; added _regionBonus() helper (×1 at 5+ tiles, ×2 at 10+ tiles); applied bonuses in recalcRates() after territory block (grass→food+1.5/3, forest→wood+1.5/3, hills→stone+1.5/3, river→gold+1/2+food+1/2, mountain→iron+1.5/3). Added region breakdown entries in getBreakdown() for HUD tooltips. ui/summaryPanel.js: Imported getTerrainControl; added _terrainControlCard() with 5 terrain rows each showing icon/name/bar-filled-to-threshold/count/bonus (green if active, dim if locked); injected after _territoryCard() in _render(). styles/main.css: .sum-terrain-row (5-col grid), .sum-terrain--active (green left-border), .sum-terrain__icon/name/bar-wrap/bar/count/bonus/bonus--locked, .sum-terrain__hint; mobile col collapse.

title: capital development plan
description: One-time permanent strategic upgrade for the player capital chosen in the Building panel. Four plans: Fortress (300g+150s+100i, +20% combat attack, -20% enemy counterattack), Commerce (300g+150w, +2 gold/s, +500 gold cap), Academy (200g+100s+100m, -25% research time, +500 mana cap), Arcane Tower (200m+150s+100i, +1.5 mana/s, -25% spell mana cost). state.capitalPlan (reset on new game). CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN event. Apply in resources.js, research.js, spells.js, combat.js, enemyAI.js. Save version 33.
notes: Created src/data/capitalPlans.js: 4 plan definitions (fortress/commerce/academy/arcane_tower) each with id/icon/name/desc/cost/bonusDesc/requiresAge. core/events.js: CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN event added. core/state.js: capitalPlan:null field added to static object + initState() reset. core/actions.js: imported CAPITAL_PLANS; added chooseCapitalPlan(planId) — validates plan exists, no existing plan, age requirement, affordability; deducts cost, sets state.capitalPlan, calls recalcRates(), emits CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN+RESOURCE_CHANGED, logs message. systems/resources.js: commerce plan +2 gold/s +500 gold cap; academy plan +500 mana cap; arcane_tower plan +1.5 mana/s — all applied before Object.assign. systems/research.js: academy plan ×0.75 totalTicks in startResearch(). systems/spells.js: arcane_tower plan ×0.75 mana cost (stacks multiplicatively with arcane archetype). systems/combat.js: fortress plan ×1.20 attackPower in both getAttackPreview() and attackTile(), applied after War Banner decree. systems/enemyAI.js: fortress plan ×0.80 winChance in _counterattack(). ui/buildingPanel.js: imported chooseCapitalPlan+CAPITAL_PLANS+CAPITAL_PLAN_ORDER; added CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN listener; added choose-plan action in panel.onclick; added _capitalPlansSection() — if plan chosen: shows gold-bordered active-plan card with icon/name/bonus list; else: shows plan grid with 4 .cap-plan-card entries (header icon/name/cost, desc, bonus list, age-lock notice if needed, Establish Plan button); builds fail gracefully with btn--shake. ui/summaryPanel.js: added CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN listener; added capital plan row in _statsCard(); re-renders on plan selection. main.js: capitalPlan in _save()/_applySave(); save version bumped 32→33; CAPITAL_PLAN_CHOSEN→_updateScoreBadge. styles/main.css: .cap-plan-section (gold border-left), .cap-plan-section__header/intro, .cap-plan-grid (auto-fill 200px), .cap-plan-card/--locked, .cap-plan-card__header/name/cost, .cap-plan-cost--ok/bad, .cap-plan-card__desc, .cap-plan__bonus/lock, .btn--cap-plan (gold gradient), .cap-plan-chosen (active card, gold border+tint), .cap-plan-name/.cap-plan-bonuses.

title: conquest streak system
description: Consecutive combat victories build a streak counter. Tiers: 3+ wins → Momentum (+10% attack), 6+ wins → Battle Fury (+20% attack), 10+ wins → Unstoppable (+35% attack, doubled loot). Streak resets on any loss. Streak badge in title bar when active. Streak tier shown in combat preview modal. state.combatStreak persisted. STREAK_CHANGED event. No save version bump.
notes: STREAK_CHANGED event added to events.js. state.combatStreak={count,lastWinTick} added to static state + initState() reset. combat.js: added _streakTier()/_streakMult()/_streakLootMult() helpers; getAttackPreview() applies streak mult after skirmish, returns streakCount+streakTier; attackTile() applies streak mult before roll; _victory() increments streak, logs tier-milestone messages (at 3/6/10 wins), emits STREAK_CHANGED; _defeat() resets streak to 0, logs break msg when was ≥3, emits STREAK_CHANGED; _victory() loot uses lootMult×streakLoot so Unstoppable doubles all loot. index.html: #streak-badge added between siege-badge and score-badge. main.js: imported; _updateStreakBadge() shows badge with tier label (🔥/⚡/💥) and modifier tooltip; subscribed STREAK_CHANGED in boot; called in _newGame(); combatStreak saved/loaded (backwards-compatible default {count:0,lastWinTick:0}). mapPanel.js: _showCombatPreview() renders .cp-streak-notice showing tier label+bonus when streakTier>0, or pending hint at 2+ wins. CSS: .streak-badge/--t0/--t1/--t2/--t3 (color-coded pills), --t3 has streak-glow keyframe animation; .cp-streak-notice (amber tinted notice in modal); hidden on ≤600px.

title: alliance military aid
description: When allied with an AI empire, request temporary troop reinforcements once per 15 minutes (costs 80 gold). Aid units vary by empire: Iron Horde→3 soldiers+1 knight, Mage Council→2 mages, Sea Wolves→3 archers. Aid troops contribute to attack power for up to 5 battles then depart. Active aid shown in Military panel army section and combat preview. Diplomacy panel shows Request Aid button per allied empire with cooldown. MILITARY_AID_CHANGED event. state.militaryAid saved/loaded. No save version bump.
notes: Created src/systems/militaryAid.js: AID_COST=80g, AID_BATTLES=5, AID_COOLDOWN_TICKS=3600 (15min); initMilitaryAid() idempotent guard; canRequestAid(empireId) validates alliance/gold/cooldown/no-duplicate; requestMilitaryAid(empireId) deducts gold, creates active entry with unit counts, sets per-empire cooldown, logs windfall message, emits MILITARY_AID_CHANGED; consumeAidBattle() decrements battlesLeft, clears active at 0 and logs departure; getActiveAid()/getAidCooldownSecs() helpers. data/empires.js: added aidUnits array to all 3 empires (ironHorde→3 soldiers+1 knight, mageCouncil→2 mages, seaWolves→3 archers). events.js: MILITARY_AID_CHANGED added. state.js: militaryAid:null added to static object + initState() reset. combat.js: imported getActiveAid+consumeAidBattle; getAttackPreview() sums aid unit attack after skirmish, returns aidActive/aidEmpireId/aidBattlesLeft fields; attackTile() adds aid attack before streak mult; replaced if/else return with const result = ... then consumeAidBattle() before return (ensures each battle consumes 1 charge win or loss). main.js: imported initMilitaryAid; called in boot+_newGame; militaryAid saved/loaded. ui/diplomacyPanel.js: imported all aid exports; subscribed MILITARY_AID_CHANGED→render; TICK handler checks hasAidActivity; _aidRow(emp) renders aid row for allied empires (active badge / request button with cooldown countdown); injected into _empireCard() between gift row and actions; request-aid case in _onClick() with btn--shake on error. ui/militaryPanel.js: imported getActiveAid; subscribed MILITARY_AID_CHANGED→render; _armySection() appends .mil-aid-row when aid active showing empire+units+battlesLeft. mapPanel.js: _showCombatPreview() renders green .cp-siege-notice for active aid showing battles remaining. CSS: .dipl-aid-row/--active, .dipl-aid-label/.dipl-aid-cd, .btn--request-aid (green border/hover), .mil-aid-row (green tinted).

title: empire festivals — temporary production and combat boosts
description: Three player-declared festivals in the Research/Governance panel: Harvest Festival (80g+40 food → +60% food/wood 90s, +4 morale), Military Parade (100g+30 iron → +25% attack 3 battles, +6 morale), Grand Trade Fair (150g → +50% gold 90s, +3 morale). One active festival at a time. 8-minute cooldown after each. FESTIVAL_CHANGED event. state.festivals saved/loaded. Save version 34.
notes: Created src/data/festivals.js: 3 festival definitions (harvest/parade/trade_fair) with icon/name/desc/cost/durationTicks|charges/moraleDelta/effects; FESTIVAL_ORDER array; FESTIVAL_COOLDOWN_TICKS=1920 (8min). Created src/systems/festivals.js: initFestivals() idempotent guard; useFestival(type) validates no-active/not-on-cooldown/affordability, deducts cost, applies morale, builds active record, calls recalcRates(), emits FESTIVAL_CHANGED; festivalTick() expires timed festivals (harvest/trade_fair) at expiresAt, clears active, sets cooldownUntil, calls recalcRates(); parade charges consumed by combat.js; getActiveFestival()/getFestivalSecsLeft()/getFestivalCooldownSecs() helpers. core/events.js: FESTIVAL_CHANGED added. core/state.js: festivals:null field in static object + initState() reset. systems/resources.js: _festActive block after decree section — harvest applies ×1.6 food+wood, trade_fair applies ×1.5 gold. systems/combat.js: getAttackPreview() applies ×1.25 to parade active (_paradeActive), returns paradeChargesLeft; attackTile() applies ×1.25 when parade active (_paradeUp); T103 charge-consume block after war banner consume — decrements chargesLeft, clears active+sets cooldownUntil at 0, emits FESTIVAL_CHANGED. ui/researchPanel.js: imported FESTIVALS/FESTIVAL_ORDER/useFestival/helpers; subscribed FESTIVAL_CHANGED→render + throttled TICK→render while active/on-cooldown; _festivalsSection() renders active-banner (time or charges countdown), cooldown-banner, or 3 .festival-card entries with affordability-coloured costs and Declare button; panel.onclick handles data-festival attr calling useFestival(). main.js: imported initFestivals+festivalTick; registerSystem(festivalTick); initFestivals() in boot+_newGame; festivals saved/loaded; save version 33→34. styles/main.css: .festival-section/header/intro, .festival-active-banner (gold border+tint), .festival-active-icon/body/time/charges, .festival-cooldown-banner, .festival-grid (auto-fill 190px), .festival-card/--active, .festival-card__header/icon/name, .festival-badge (gold pill), .festival-card__desc/cost, .festival-cost--ok/bad, .btn--festival (gold hover), mobile single-column.

title: map resource node events — temporary capture-for-bonus spots
description: Every 5–8 minutes, 1–2 glowing resource nodes appear on revealed neutral tiles. Each node has a terrain-matching resource reward (scaled with tick). Nodes expire after 4 minutes if uncaptured. Canvas: amber ✦ glyph on node tiles. Map stats bar shows live count. Tile tooltip shows resource reward and countdown. Capturing the node grants the resources and removes it. RESOURCE_NODE_CHANGED event. state.resourceNodes saved/loaded. No save version bump.
notes: Created src/systems/resourceNodes.js: TERRAIN_NODE lookup (grass→gold/forest→wood/hills→stone/river→food/mountain→iron) with base reward amounts; _scaledAmount() applies +10% per 500 ticks; initResourceNodes() idempotent struct guard; resourceNodeTick() expires nodes and spawns 1–2 new nodes per wave (SPAWN_MIN=1200/MAX=1920 ticks); _spawnWave() finds revealed neutral tiles excluding caravan tile and existing nodes, picks random spots; collectResourceNode(x,y) grants resources (capped), removes node, emits RESOURCE_CHANGED+RESOURCE_NODE_CHANGED; clearResourceNode(x,y) silently removes node (called on enemy expansion or player combat capture); getNodeAt()/nodeSecsLeft()/activeNodeCount() helpers. events.js: RESOURCE_NODE_CHANGED added. state.js: resourceNodes:null in static object + initState() reset. systems/combat.js: imported clearResourceNode; _victory() calls clearResourceNode(x,y) after _tryCaptureLandmark. systems/enemyAI.js: imported clearResourceNode; _expandEnemies() calls clearResourceNode(nx,ny) before setting owner='enemy'. ui/mapPanel.js: imported collectResourceNode/getNodeAt/nodeSecsLeft/activeNodeCount; added NODE_TINT='rgba(255,170,0,0.35)' constant; initMapPanel() subscribes RESOURCE_NODE_CHANGED→_render; _drawTile() applies amber glow tint + draws '✦' glyph at tile centre for active nodes; _showTileTip() detects isNodeTile (getNodeAt) and shows gold-coloured resource/amount/countdown row + 'Click to collect' action row; _onClick() checks node first (before caravan) and calls collectResourceNode; _updateStats() appends '✦ Nodes: N' to stats bar when nodes>0. main.js: imported initResourceNodes+resourceNodeTick; registerSystem(resourceNodeTick) as 23rd system; initResourceNodes() in boot+_newGame; resourceNodes saved/loaded (no save version bump — backwards-compatible null default).
